object: closed representation packages produced after UPP-W5 machinery closure
anti_collapse_rules: matching extensional behavior is insufficient when dependencies differ
matching current state is insufficient when histories differ
renaming is allowed only through explicit bijections
hidden-state expansion is allowed only when identity and query commitments round-trip
ontology compression is forbidden when it merges distinguishable commitments
error and Unknown outcomes may not be collapsed
support machinery may not be ignored after closure
canonicalization may normalize syntax but may not erase commitment-relevant distinctions
unknown_rules: unproved totality yields Unknown absent a positive failure
unproved effectivity yields Unknown absent a positive failure
an unresolved required dimension yields Unknown absent a positive failure
a missing positive bijection or preservation witness yields non-equivalence when the mismatch is demonstrated
invariance_scope: temporal refinement and coarsening only with reversible history-preserving maps
nonclaims: not every behaviorally equivalent package is commitment-equivalent
no RCCD component is proved necessary
no sufficiency or irreducibility theorem is established
